summary: Comprehensive testing of Multi-University E-Learning Platform with 50/50 split-screen presentation feature. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend pages load correctly: Landing page shows stats (490+ courses, 5 universities, 150K+ MCQs), 50/50 presentation page with all controls working (CC subtitles, Hebrew option, volume, play/pause, fullscreen), University catalog shows 94 courses with MCQ progress.

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'No courses found' - data structure issue with years/courses relationship, UI elements present and working
integration_issues.priority: LOW - data structure issue, not UI bug

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api - API health check accessible
Backend: GET /api/universities - returns 5 universities
Backend: GET /api/courses - returns 200 courses
Backend: GET /api/courses/{id}/questions - returns MCQ questions with proper structure
Backend: GET /api/avatar-videos/{module_id} - serves video/mp4 correctly (200)
Backend: HEAD /api/avatar-videos/{module_id} - returns video metadata
Backend: GET /api/audio/{filename}.mp3 - serves audio/mpeg correctly (200)
Backend: HEAD /api/audio/{filename}.mp3 - returns audio metadata with Content-Length
Backend: GET /api/presentations-50-50/{module_id} - serves HTML correctly
Backend: 50/50 Presentation contains avatar video element
Backend: 50/50 Presentation contains subtitles toggle (CC button)
Backend: 50/50 Presentation contains play button
Backend: 50/50 Presentation has 50/50 split-screen layout
Backend: Second 50/50 Presentation (UG_DENT_Y3_S1_C03_M01) available
Backend: Presentation has Hebrew subtitles option (MOCKED - placeholder)
Backend: Presentation has synchronized subtitle timing data
Backend: Presentation has autoplay attribute
Backend: Video is muted for browser autoplay compliance
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero section, search, stats (490+ courses, 5 unis, 150K+ MCQs)
Frontend: 50/50 Presentation page loads with all controls visible
Frontend: Avatar video element visible in left 50%
Frontend: Slides panel visible in right 50% with 7 slides
Frontend: CC (subtitles) toggle button works - shows language selector
Frontend: Language selector shows English and Hebrew options
Frontend: Volume button and slider visible and clickable
Frontend: Fullscreen button visible
Frontend: Progress bar visible with slide indicator (1/7)
Frontend: University catalog loads and shows 94 course cards
Frontend: Dashboard redirects to login for unauthenticated users
Frontend: Login page displays with Google OAuth button
critical_code_review_comments: Hebrew subtitles are MOCKED (placeholder translations) - need real Hebrew translation integration
Video autoplay is muted by default (browser requirement) with unmute overlay
Course catalog by major (/catalog/UG_DENT) shows empty - years/courses relationship may need verification
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing 94 UG courses
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 50/50 presentation features working: video streaming, audio streaming, HTML presentation with 50/50 layout, CC subtitles with Hebrew option (MOCKED), autoplay with muted audio, volume controls, progress bar, fullscreen. Backend APIs 100% functional. Hebrew translation subtitles are placeholder text.

mocked_features.hebrew_subtitles: Hebrew translations are placeholder text [תרגום] prefix, not real translations
